changes.description: Replaced verbose 180-line original skill with condensed ~80-line version based on proven bare/qwen3.5-122b variant. Key changes: removed irrelevant sections (CMS guidance, validation tools, related skills, interactive assessment), added explicit JSON-LD templates for Product and FAQPage with field-level requirements, added clear rules about numeric types and full URL enumerations, added step-by-step workflow. Removed unused references/ directory.
